title: Elementify Free + Advanced Final Completion Plan

slices.title: Guided transition chaining
slices.goal: Chain safe presets into short guided transitions for the most important early Free paths.
acceptance: A Free tool can run a short guided transition instead of only one preset at a time.
Safe steps execute and preview-only steps remain preview-only.
Transition output explains what happened and what remains manual.

slices.title: Scenario family completion
slices.goal: Complete the missing Free runtime scenario families.
acceptance: New-site-lite and extension-lite exist as runtime wizard families.
Cleanup and refresh map cleanly into the runtime family model.
Front-door routing no longer falls back loosely for major Free intents.

slices.title: Profile-aware runtime shaping
slices.goal: Make stack, skill, and addon profiles change runtime defaults more meaningfully.
acceptance: Profile routing changes runtime outputs and preset defaults in observable ways.
Behavior remains deterministic and tested.

slices.title: Public Free runtime lock
slices.goal: Lock the public Free runtime story after the scenario-first shift.
acceptance: Docs, runtime grouping, and mirror rules remain consistent.
Public Free guidance does not overpromise Advanced or Studio behavior.

slices.title: Advanced scenario front door
slices.goal: Add a true scenario-first front door for Advanced above advanced_creator_mode.
acceptance: Advanced scenario entry is explicit and distinct from Free.
Deep relaunch, migration, critique-repair, and premium rollout are routable.

slices.title: Deep scenario workflows
slices.goal: Strengthen the main Advanced scenario families as runtime workflows.
acceptance: Deep relaunch, migration, critique-repair, and premium rollout have stronger multi-step plans.
Workflow outputs are measurably deeper than current orchestration.

slices.title: Upgrade and stack-shaping runtime
slices.goal: Operationalize Advanced upgrade guidance and stack shaping.
acceptance: Upgrade-path behavior is scenario-driven at runtime.
Elementor Pro, Elementify Advanced, and pro-addon guidance is explicit and honest.

slices.title: Productivity finish
slices.goal: Make Advanced feel like a true productivity layer rather than only deeper tools.
acceptance: At least one Advanced path materially reduces workflow effort beyond the current state.
Governance-aware follow-up and reuse-light behavior are stronger.

slices.title: Final surface and release lock
slices.goal: Run the final product lock after Free and Advanced runtime completion.
acceptance: Free mirror and release verification pass.
Advanced surface verification passes.
Studio deferment remains explicit and credible.
